workflowtools 0.0.13
  • Reference

  • Changelog

Connect to a Microsoft Teams channel's file area

Source: R/teams.R
teams_connect.Rd

Authenticates against Microsoft Graph and resolves a team, one of its channels, and that channel's root drive folder. Microsoft365R (via AzureAuth) caches the token under the AzureR cache dir, so after a successful device-code login subsequent calls reuse the cached token.

teams_connect(
  team,
  channel,
  tenant,
  app = "04b07795-8ddb-461a-bbee-02f9e1bf7b46",
  auth_type = "device_code"
)

Arguments

team

Team name or id (passed to Microsoft365R::get_team()).

channel

Channel name (e.g. "General").

tenant

Azure tenant (e.g. an organisation short name).

app

Azure app (client) id. Defaults to the well-known Azure CLI public-client id, which sidesteps needing a tenant admin to approve a bespoke app registration (see the Microsoft365R auth vignette).

auth_type

Authentication flow; defaults to "device_code".

Value

A named list with elements team (an ms_team), channel (an ms_channel), and folder (the channel root ms_drive_item).

Contents

Developed by Alex M Chubaty.
